title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A YouTube tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python. The course demonstrates building a serverless REST API by first manually setting up DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway in the AWS console, then rebuilding the same infrastructure declaratively using CDK for simplified deployment and management.
